title: geum urbanorivale
intro: Geum urbanorivale, also known as the white avens, is a perennial plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Geum urbanorivale include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Geum urbanorivale can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
